name: Ondansetron
description: Zaɓaɓɓen 5-HT3 antagonist antiemetic. Mai tasiri sosai ga tashin zuciya da amai. ODT (kwal ɗin da ke watsewa baki) yana da amfani a saitunan filin lokacin da babu IV. Haɗe cikin wasu fakitin kwayayen yaƙi.
indications: Nausea da amai (chemotherapy, opioid-induced, post-operative, TBI mai alaƙa)
dose: 4-8 mg IV/IO jinkirin turawa akan 2-5 min. ODT: 4-8 MG narkar da harshe. IM: 4 mg.
contraindications: Sanannen hypersensitivity ga ondansetron ko wasu antagonists 5-HT3
Ciwon QT mai tsayi na haihuwa (babban kashi IV kawai)
warnings: Babban adadin IV na iya tsawaita tazarar QT -- yi amfani da mafi ƙarancin tasiri na IV.
Baya maye gurbin sarrafa hanyar iska a cikin majiyyata da aka rufe da amai -- kare hanyar iska da farko.

pediatric.dose: 0.1-0.15 mg/kg IV (max 4 MG). ODT: 4mg ga yara> 4 shekaru.
pediatric.note: An yi amfani da shi sosai kuma an jure shi sosai a cikin ilimin yara.

obstetric.note: Bayanai masu iyaka a cikin ciki. Yi amfani da tashin zuciya mai tsanani / amai bayan farkon trimester lokacin da amfanin ya fi haɗari. Ba a ba da shawarar a farkon farkon watanni uku ba.
